block.text: You enter the village and investigate. You find one useful robot, a Digger Robot. This slow but powerful machine rides on treads. It has a bulldozer blade on the front, a scoop-shovel on the back, and two large claws for lifting.

choice.text: Explore somewhere else in the City of Knowledge.

robot.name: Digger
robot.description: Slow, but powerful machine that runs on treads. Has a bulldozer blade on the front, a scoop-shovel on the back and two large claws for lifting.
